title: Institutes
description: Manage all institutes on the platform.

approval.approveDescription: This will begin the setup workflow for this institute. Students and staff can join once setup completes.
approval.rejectDescription: Provide a reason for rejecting this institute application.
approval.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this institute is being rejected (min. 10 characters)…
approval.rejectMinLength: Reason must be at least 10 characters.

empty.title: No institutes found
empty.description: There are no institutes matching your filters.
empty.noDataDescription: Create your first institute to get started.
empty.noPendingDescription: All institute applications have been reviewed.

detail.title: Institute Details
detail.auditPlaceholder: Audit logs for this institute will be displayed here.
detail.configReadOnly: Configuration is managed by institute administrators.
detail.brandingReadOnly: Branding is managed by institute administrators.

actions.activateDescription: This institute will become fully operational. Users can log in.
actions.deactivateDescription: Users will not be able to log in. Data is preserved.
actions.suspendDescription: This institute will be forcibly suspended. Provide a reason.
actions.suspendReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this institute is being suspended…
actions.rejectDescription: This is a terminal action. The institute cannot be reactivated after rejection.
actions.deleteDescription: This will hide the institute and all its data. You can restore it later.
actions.restoreDescription: This institute will be restored and visible again.

create.title: Create Institute
create.description: Register a new institute on the platform.

sections.identityDescription: Name, type and structure of the institute.
sections.ownershipDescription: Who manages this institute on the platform.
sections.contactDescription: Phone numbers and email addresses for the institute.

create.name: Institute Name
create.nameDescription: Full, official name shown to parents, staff and students.
create.codeDescription: Unique short identifier (max 50 chars). Cannot be changed later.
create.codeHelpBody: A short uppercase identifier used in URLs, receipts and exports (e.g. DPS-GBN-01). It must be unique across all institutes on the platform and cannot be changed after creation.
create.typeDescription: Determines which features (academic structure, boards, fees) are enabled.
create.structureFrameworkDescription: NEP 2020 follows a 5+3+3+4 pattern. Traditional follows the 10+2 pattern.
create.structureFrameworkHelpBody: Choose NEP if your institute follows the National Education Policy 2020 foundational→secondary mapping. Choose Traditional for the 10+2 pattern used by CBSE and most state boards.
create.boardDescription: Primary board of affiliation. More affiliations can be added later.
create.departmentsDescription: Academic departments this institute will operate.
create.resellerDescription: Reseller responsible for onboarding and billing. Leave blank for Roviq-managed institutes.
create.groupDescription: Optional grouping for multi-branch chains (e.g. "DPS Group").
create.contactDescription: Phone numbers and email addresses for the institute.
create.phonesDescription: Add at least one number. WhatsApp-enabled numbers will receive parent notifications.
create.phoneInvalid: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits.
create.whatsappHelp: Will be used for parent notifications.
create.emailsDescription: Official email addresses. The primary email receives transactional notifications.
create.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
create.postalCodeDescription: 6-digit Indian postal code. City and state will auto-fill.
create.postalCodeInvalid: PIN code must be exactly 6 digits.
create.postalCodeLookupFailed: Could not look up PIN code. Please fill city and state manually.
create.postalCodeLookedUp: Filled city and state from PIN {pin}.
create.isDemoDescription: Demo institutes receive sample data during setup and are excluded from billing.
create.codeTooLong: Institute code must be 50 characters or fewer.
create.codeDuplicate: An institute with this code already exists.
create.resellerInvalid: Selected reseller is invalid or inactive.
create.draftBanner: You have an unsaved draft from {time}. Restore it?
create.formInvalid: Please fix the highlighted errors and try again.
